itinerary.title: Hanoi arrival
itinerary.description: As you step off your plane at Noi Bai International Airport, our friendly guide will be waiting for you at the baggage claim area. Look for the sign adorned with our distinctive Asia Tour Advisor logo and your name. Your comfort and ease are our top priorities. Once you're ready, we'll escort you to your hotel, providing a brief introduction to the city along the way. The remainder of the day is yours to settle in, unwind, and begin exploring Hanoi.
activities: Hanoi, with its seven million inhabitants, serves as the capital of Vietnam. This city gracefully combines tradition and refinement, boasting French colonial architecture, tree-lined boulevards, seren

itinerary.title: Hanoi city tour- Night train to Lao Cai station
itinerary.description: Hanoi is an irresistible destination for its picturesque pagodas, ancient temples, enchanting French colonial quarter, and cultural institutions. Just as fun, however, is darting down its winding lanes and discovering your own favorite hidden corners. Hanoi’s winding streets are full of surprises from quiet cafés to vibrant local markets filled with more fresh fruit than one could imagine. Exploring these hidden gems provides visitors with a deeper and more meaningful connection to the city of Hanoi and offers a memorable visit to all.
activities: After a satisfying breakfast at your hotel, our local tour guide will pick you up to embark on an exploration of Vietnam's capital city, Hanoi. With over a thousand years of history, this city is rich

In addition to these historically rich sites like Chi Minh Mausoleum, your tour guide will take you to the delicate beauty of the One Pillar Pagoda and the Tran Quoc Temple. These places of worship ar
After lunch, continue your journey with a visit to the millennia-old Temple of Literature. This ancient Confucius temple once served as the country's first university and played an incredibly crucial

Next on the itinerary for the day is a visit to Hoa Lo. This somber historical site once acted as a prison used by the French colonists in Vietnam for political prisoners. Later it was used by North V
Return to your hotel after Hanoi city tour.Dinner by yourself and free time until about 20h30, We will come to pick you up and transfer to Hanoi station for the night train to Lao Cai station.

itinerary.title: Lao Cai - Sapa - Visit Cat Cat village
itinerary.description: The train arrives at around 6:00 am. Look for the “AsiaTourAdvisor’s Logo & Your Name” sign when you exit the train station, as our driver will pick you up there and transfer to the former hill station of Sapa.
activities: After having breakfast at a local restaurant, have having a short transfer to visit Cat Cat village which is the home to Black Hmong. Coming into some local houses to study how the local people make t

Continuing to walk to the Fairy waterfall where you can take photos and relax before following mountain trail to see Golden Stream where you can swim in the summer time. After that we will have 15 min

itinerary.title: Sapa - Muong Hoa valley - Express bus to Hanoi
itinerary.description: After breakfast and check out hotel,we have a short transfer to visit Y Linh Ho village which is inhabited by black Hmong tribe and completely secluded from tourists, especially you are able to embrace raw Sapa culture and community by coming into some native houses to discover their own culture and custom as well as study how the local tribe make handicraft from natural materials such as: hemp, indigo…ect. Continuing to walk down Muong Hoa River where you can take a rest or swim before trekking uphill to Lao Chai village where your picnic lunch will be served. After lunch, you will visit the Day and Red Dzao tribes of Tavan village, which lies in the middle of Muong Hoa valley where excellent panoramas of rice terraced fields.We will return to Sapa and have a short rest before to to the bus office to return to Hanoi.You will arrive Hanoi at about 20h30 to 21h00.Check in hotel and overnight at hotel in Hanoi.

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay
itinerary.description: Our journey embarks from Hanoi where we'll pick you up for a scenic drive through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta. Our destination: the world-famous UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay. Here, you'll embark on a luxurious cruise for an enchanting overnight cruise.
activities: As you relax on board, you'll be captivated by the breathtaking limestone karsts that majestically emerge from the azure waters, surrounded by thousands of jungle-clad islands seemingly suspended on t

Enjoy a delicious seafood lunch with breathtaking views and a refreshing drink. Our next destination is a charming fishing village, where locals have ingeniously turned their boats into a floating com

itinerary.title: Halong - Hanoi – Flight to Hue
itinerary.description: Kickstart your day with Tai Chi on the top deck or savor the sunrise over the bay. Sip on morning coffee or tea before setting out to explore nearby islands via rowboat.
activities: Upon returning to the junk, witness a fruit carving demonstration and participate in a cooking class, learning to create traditional Vietnamese cuisine from scratch. Enjoy a Vietnamese lunch on board

Upon arrival in Hue, your tour guide and driver will transfer you to your hotel in Hue. Hue is one of the most charming towns in the Central Vietnam and has a long and illustrious history as it used t

itinerary.title: Hue Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Hue is one of the most charming towns in Central Vietnam boasting a long and illustrious history as one of the main royal capitals of the country.
activities: On today’s exhibition, you will explore the royal city of Hue once served as an imperial capital to the Nguyen Lords, a feudal dynasty that reigned from the 17th to the 19th century. This historical c

Once you have the chance to finish breakfast, a private guide, accompanied by a driver will pick you up to start an exciting day of exploration. Your adventure begins with a visit to the atmospheric I
From the Imperial City, your guide will escort you to the iconic Thien Mu Pagoda, Hue’s most famous religious site, with its origins dating back to 1601. Here you will explore the pagoda’s landscaped

Hue is famous for its Royal cuisine which combines delicious flavors and elegant presentation. The Nguyen Emperors’ banquets were legendary, with some feats rumored to have included 300 rare dishes se

After lunch, you will explore the tomb of the longest-reigning Emperor Tu Duc. Located in a tranquil setting of gardens and ponds, the tomb is a masterpiece inspired by Chinese Confucianism. The harmo

Continue your journey through Hue with a visit to the tomb of King Khai Dinh. This remarkable structure was designed in traditional Vietnamese style with a European touch making it unique from the oth

Following your immersive day in Hue's cultural treasures, the evening opens to you, providing a canvas upon which you can relax or choose to further explore the city's captivating offerings. You may c

itinerary.title: Travel from Hue to Hoi An
itinerary.description: After breakfast and check out of your hotel, meet your private guide and driver for a three-hour drive to Hoi An via the stunningly Hai Van Pass. Also known as the “Cloudy Pass,” this winding mountain road overlooks the lush countryside, sandy beaches, the blue waters of the South China Sea, and the coastal city of Da Nang.
activities: En route, you will pause in Danang to visit the Marble Mountain with its beautiful caves of worship and the Museum of Cham Sculpture’s collection of artifacts dating back to the seventh century.
Upon arriving in Hoi An, you'll check in to your hotel and have the rest of the afternoon to unwind on the sandy shores of Cua Dai Beach.
Hoi An thrived as a bustling port city from the 16th to the 19th century, conducting trade with merchants from China, Japan, India, Indonesia, and Europe.

Today, the UNESCO World Heritage Old Quarter of Hoi An preserves the city's past with ornate pagodas, antique trading houses, and historic tile-roofed shops. These have been transformed into art galle

Hoi An is renowned for its architectural fusion of Chinese, Japanese, Vietnamese, and European styles, offering a rich cultural tapestry. Surrounding the city are scenic countryside landscapes with tr

itinerary.title: Hoi An Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Begin your day with a morning market tour, sourcing a variety of fresh ingredients for your upcoming cooking class later in the afternoon. Accompanied by your guide and driver, you'll embark on a journey to the bustling Hoi An local market, where a myriad of sights, sounds, and aromas await. Take a leisurely stroll through the market's vibrant aisles, engaging with local vendors and selecting the finest produce for your culinary adventure that awaits. Though some may find the markets overwhelming, when looking for fresh food for a good price the market is my favorite place to visit. The immense amount of variety offered ensures that I can find everything that I need.
activities: Following your market escapade, head to Cam Thanh village, making a pit stop at the enchanting Bay Mau Water Palm Forest. Enjoy a brief riverside walk in this quaint fishing hamlet before hopping onto

Next, continue to Tra Que herbs and vegetables village, where a farmer's family awaits to greet you. Don traditional farmer attire and explore the nearby farming land with authentic tools. Engage in a
Cap off the day with an afternoon exploration of Hoi An's UNESCO-recognized ancient town. Visit iconic landmarks such as the Japanese Bridge, a Sino-Vietnamese merchant house, a Chinese Temple, Hoian

itinerary.title: Ho An - Da nang airport -Fly to Ho Chi minh
itinerary.description: After breakfast, we'll pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City.
activities: Upon your arrival, we'll ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, allowing you to spend the evening immersing yourself in the bustling atmosphere of Saigon.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Sightseeing - Cu Chi tunnels
itinerary.description: After enjoying your breakfast, your private guide will meet accompany you on a drive to Cu Chi, a quaint community located 60km northwest of Ho Chi Minh City. Cu Chi is renowned for its extensive network of tunnels, which served as a strategic hideout and infiltration route for the Viet Cong during the latter stages of the Vietnam War.
activities: Upon arrival, you'll have the opportunity to watch a brief introductory video from the era before delving into the tunnels themselves, widely recognized as one of the world's most significant battlegr
After exploring the Tunnels, you'll return to the city, where you'll enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant.

In the afternoon you will embark on a journey to discover some of Ho Chi Minh City's most iconic landmarks. You will begin with the Reunification Palace, a monumental witness to the culmination of the

Next, visit the Notre Dame Cathedral and the colonial-styled Central Post Office.  The War Remnants Museum offers fascinating insights into the Vietnamese struggle for independence, freedom, and peace

Conclude your day with a visit to Ben Thanh Market, an iconic symbol of the city. Pulsating with the energy of commerce and cultural vibrancy, where the rhythmic bargaining and the aromas of street fo

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh –Mekong Delta - Ben Tre
itinerary.description: Escape the urban hustle of Ho Chi Minh City as you embark on a journey to My Tho, a serene town nestled on the left bank of the Mekong River. Upon arrival, explore the historic Vinh Trang Pagoda, dating back to the late 19th century. Board a sampan and cruise along the Mekong, discovering the enchanting Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix, and Tortoise islands.
activities: Pause at Unicorn Island to stroll along country lanes, marvel at orchards, and relish tropical fruits amid the melodies of local folk songs. Explore a fruit plantation before gliding through Thoi Son

In the afternoon, pedal through Tan Thach village, engaging with local villagers to glimpse everyday life in the Mekong Delta. Alternatively, unwind in a hammock, savoring the cool breeze for those op

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh - Fly to Phu Quoc island
itinerary.description: Breakfast at your hotel. You will have free time until our driver come to pick you up and transfer to airport for your flight to Phu Quoc island. Upon arrive at the airport, the driver of hotel will pick you up by sharing bus and transfer to hotel.You will have free time on Phu Quoc island.

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc free and relax
itinerary.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at the hotel and spend your day at your own pace.Phu Quoc Island, often referred to as the "Pearl Island," boasts stunning beaches, beautiful islands, and deserted shores. Whether you seek relaxation or outdoor activities, our travel experts are at your disposal to provide recommendations and help you tailor your day to your preferences.

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc - Fly to Ho Chi Minh – Departure
itinerary.description: Your time will be your own until the driver of hotel pick you up and transfer to airport for your flight to Tan Son Nhat airport in Ho Chi Minh city.From here, you will connect your flight back home. This marks the end of your Flavor of Vietnam adventure with Asia Tour Advisor.
activities: We extend our heartfelt thanks for joining us on this incredible journey to explore the wonders of Vietnam. Farewell, and we hope to welcome you back soon. Should you desire more exploration of our co
Note: Asia Tour Advisor can also customize additional trips to meet your specific expectations if the above itinerary does not fully align with your desires.
